title: senecio auritifolius
intro: Senecio auritifolius, also known as Golden Groundsel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio auritifolius include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and exhibiting antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio auritifolius include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
